This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.

    TermLabelManager.label(Services services, TermLabelState state, JTerm applicationTerm, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Rule rule, RuleApp ruleApp, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm newTerm)
    Computes the TermLabels for the new JTerm via TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, JTerm, JTerm) and refactors the labels below the new JTerm in addition via TermLabelManager.refactorTerm(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, JTerm, Goal, Object, Rule, JTerm).

    boolean
    QueryExpand.isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
    Important the correctness of the implementation of this rule relies on the following side-conditions: the query term has no free variables the query term does not occur below an update or a modality If you want to change this you need to adapt the application logic by adding preceding updates in front of the new added formula and/or to take care of free variables when introducing the skolemfunction symbol and when replacing the query term by the skolem function.
